statusBanner.pending: Your account is under review. You can prepare submissions but nothing goes live until approved.
statusBanner.suspended: Your account has been suspended. All upload, submit, and film management actions are blocked.

dashboard.title: Producer Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your earnings and manage your content

uploadCta.title: Upload a Film
uploadCta.subtitle: Submit your content for review — approved films go live on the platform

contractWarning.expiringMessage: Your agreement expires in {{days}} days. Renew now to avoid interruptions.
contractWarning.expiredMessage: Please renew your Producer Distribution Agreement. Distribution of newly approved content will be paused until renewal.

withdraw.title: Withdraw Earnings
withdraw.successMsg: Request submitted! Processing within 3–5 business days.
withdraw.errorMsg: Failed to submit. Please try again.

onboarding.subtitle: Complete your producer profile so viewers and our admin team can learn about you and your work.
onboarding.stepDesc: Help viewers and IKIGEMBE's team understand who you are as a producer.
onboarding.photoHint: Optional. Click the circle to upload.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about your background, the stories you love to tell, and what makes your films unique…

errors.bioMin: Bio must be at least 20 characters.

upload.rulesSubtitle: Please read and follow the rules and requirements before uploading your film.
upload.readyText: Ready to upload your movie? Click the button below to get started.

details.title: Movie Details
details.subtitle: Fill in all information about your movie before uploading files.
details.longlineMin: Longline must be at least 10 characters.
details.synopsisMin: Synopsis must be at least 20 characters.
details.castHint: e.g. Actor A, Actor B, Actor C
details.freePreview: Allow free preview for this movie

trailer.title: Upload Trailer
trailer.subtitle: Upload your movie trailer. Maximum duration: 30 seconds.
trailer.hint: Max duration: 30 seconds | Max size: 100 MB

movie.title: Upload Full Movie
movie.subtitle: Upload the full movie file. Duration must be between 10 and 30 minutes.
movie.hint: Min: 10 min | Max: 30 min | Max size: 200 MB | Formats: MP4, MOV

copyright.title: Copyright Proof
copyright.subtitle: Upload proof of copyright ownership for your movie. Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG (max 10 MB).
copyright.hint: PDF, JPG, or PNG — max 10 MB

review.title: Review Your Submission
review.subtitle: Please review all information before submitting.

success.title: Thank You!
success.message: Your movie has been submitted successfully. We will review your movie and get back to you soon.
success.reviewTimeline: Our team typically reviews submissions within 3–5 business days. You'll receive an email notification once a decision has been made.

movies.title: My Films
movies.subtitle: All films you have submitted to the platform
movies.empty: You have no films submitted yet.

edit.title: Edit Film
edit.note: The video file, duration, and release date cannot be changed after submission.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Your earnings and withdrawal details.
wallet.shareNote: Your revenue share is {{percent}}% of every ticket sold.

dashboard.title: Distribution Agreement
dashboard.subtitle: Your legal agreement to distribute films on Ikigembe.
dashboard.descNone: You haven't signed a Distribution Agreement yet. You must sign one before any approved films go live on the platform.
dashboard.descActive: Your agreement is active. All approved films are live on the platform.
dashboard.descExpiring: Your agreement expires soon. Renew now to avoid any interruption to your films.
dashboard.descExpired: Your agreement has expired. Your films have been taken offline until you renew.
dashboard.noMovies: You need to upload at least one movie before you can sign a Distribution Agreement.

infoRevenue.title: Revenue Rights
infoRevenue.desc: You retain your earnings. Ikigembe takes a platform fee as defined in the agreement.

infoOwnership.title: Content Ownership
infoOwnership.desc: You keep full ownership of your films. The agreement grants Ikigembe a limited distribution licence.

infoRenewal.title: Annual Renewal
infoRenewal.desc: Agreements run for one year. You'll be notified 30 days before expiry so you can renew without interruption.

welcome.title: Congratulations!
welcome.subtitle: Your movie has been approved for distribution on Ikigembe.
welcome.infoLine1: To distribute content on our platform, you must complete a
welcome.infoLine2: This agreement applies to your account and covers all movies you distribute on Ikigembe. It remains valid for
welcome.noMovies: You need to upload at least one movie before you can sign a Distribution Agreement.

language.title: Select Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language for your Producer Distribution Agreement.

review.title: Producer Distribution Agreement
review.subtitle: Please read the full agreement carefully before proceeding. Scroll to the bottom to continue.
review.scrollHint: ↓ Scroll to the bottom to enable Continue

warning.title: WARNING
warning.subtitle: This agreement must be accepted within 78 hours (3 days and 6 hours) from the time it was sent.
warning.bullet2: The movie will be returned to Pending Submission.
warning.bullet3: The Producer will be required to restart the process.

acceptance.title: Sign the Agreement
acceptance.subtitle: Your typed name serves as your legal signature.
acceptance.agreeText: I have read and fully agree to the

verifying.pleaseWait: Please wait while we process your agreement.

success.title: Agreement Approved
success.subtitle: Your Producer Distribution Agreement has been successfully recorded.
success.bullet1: Your approved movies are now live on Ikigembe.
success.bullet2: You will be notified 30 days before your agreement expires.

notification.title: Movie Approved
notification.desc: Your movie has been approved for distribution. Before publishing, please complete the Producer Distribution Agreement.
